debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

proof:
rw [one_div_div] at hN
  linarith [hδ₁, npos, lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)]
successful_attempts:
rw [one_div_div] at hN
  linarith [hδ₁, npos, lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)]
